sentences.arabic: يَذْهَبُ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى الْمَلْعَبِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed ide na sportski teren svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed goes to the sports field every morning.

sentences.arabic: يَجْرِي لِمُدَّةِ ثَلَاثِينَ دَقِيقَةً ثُمَّ يَسْتَرِيحُ.
sentences.translation: Trči trideset minuta, a zatim se odmori.
sentences.translationEn: He runs for thirty minutes and then rests.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ الرِّيَاضَةَ لِأَنَّهَا تَجْعَلُهُ يَشْعُرُ بِالنَّشَاطِ.
sentences.translation: Voli sport jer ga čini aktivnim.
sentences.translationEn: He loves sport because it makes him feel active.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ التَّمَارِينِ يَشْرَبُ كُوبًا كَبِيرًا مِنَ الْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon vježbanja pije veliku čašu vode.
sentences.translationEn: After exercise he drinks a large glass of water.
